Courses in 2025-2026 Academic Catalog - DRAFT COPY 711

FREN439 Studies in 17th Century French Literature and Culture (3 Credits)

Selected topics in seventeenth-century French literature. Prerequisite: FREN387; and (FREN351 or FREN352). Or permission of ARHU-French & Italian Languages & Literatures department. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
